title: Assistant Store Manager - La Opala Digital Technologies - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - La Opala Digital Technologies - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
La Opala Digital Technologies is actively seeking a talented and motivated Assistant Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Bhopal. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About La Opala Digital Technologies:
La Opala Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Team Leadership

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with La Opala Digital Technologies!
